name CI

on
  push
    branches [ main ]
  pull_request
    branches [ main ]

jobs
  build
    runs-on ubuntu-latest

    steps
      - name Checkout source code
        uses actionscheckout@v4

      - name Set up JDK 17
        uses actionssetup-java@v4
        with
          distribution temurin
          java-version '17'

      - name Grant execute permission for Gradle
        run chmod +x gradlew

      - name Build with Gradle
        run .gradlew clean build
